title: Three Machines
embodies: Same input, three mechanisms: T-1924 removes the most frequent vowel systematically (Tynianov's imperialism of the constructive principle); P-1972 analyses emotional triggers and responds from state variables anger/fear — not from the content (Colby's designed error); F-2025 generates a bigram Markov continuation, locally coherent, globally arbitrary (Fredrikzon's epistemic indifference). The genealogy runs — it is not described.
sources: Fredrikzon, 'Rethinking Error: Hallucinations and Epistemological Indifference', Critical AI (2025)
difference-from-previous: Previous day: observer test (classification). Today: generator (three systems produce outputs from the same input). Different mechanism, different form, different site of knowledge.
